fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> allows you to construct paths incrementally by adding contours and path elements. When the path is complete, call <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach" /> to transfer ownership of the built path, or <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot" /> to get a copy without resetting the builder.

Dispose the builder when you are finished with it.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();
using var path = builder.Detach();
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
Initializes a new, empty instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

params.path: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> whose contents are copied into this builder.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class with the contents of an existing path.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc, in degrees.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle of the arc, in degrees.
params.oval: The bounds of the oval containing the arc.

fields.summary: Adds an arc that begins a new contour.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

params.dir: The direction in which to wind the circle.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.direction: The direction in which to wind the oval.
params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.point2: The end point of the second tangent line.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);
